mapper.sql: u.id, NVL(u.name, 'Unknown') AS name, u.email, u.status
mapper.select:
SELECT u.name, org.path, dept.root_dept, GREATEST(NVL(u.last_login, TO_DATE('19700101','YYYYMMDD')), NVL(u.created_at, TO_DATE('19700101','YYYYMMDD'))) AS last_active FROM users u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT org_id, SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(org_name, ' > ') AS path, CONNECT_BY_ISLEAF AS is_leaf FROM org_tree START WITH parent_id IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR org_id = parent_id ) org ON u.org_id = org.org_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dept_id, CONNECT_BY_ROOT dept_name AS root_dept FROM dept_tree START WITH parent_dept_id IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR dept_id = parent_dept_id ) dept ON u.dept_id = dept.dept_id
AND u.org_id IN ( SELECT org_id FROM org_tree START WITH org_id = #{orgId} CONNECT BY PRIOR org_id = parent_id )
AND u.status = 'A' AND u.last_login >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -3)
ORDER BY org.path, u.name
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO user_status_history t USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS user_id, #{newStatus} AS status, SYSDATE AS changed_at, NVL(#{reason}, 'System') AS reason FROM DUAL ) s ON (t.user_id = s.user_id AND t.status = s.status AND TRUNC(t.changed_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.reason = s.reason, t.updated_at = SYSDATE
DELETE WHERE t.changed_at < ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12)
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (user_id, status, changed_at, reason) VALUES (s.user_id, s.status, s.changed_at, s.reason)
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(content, 200, 1) AS preview, DBMS_LOB.GETLENGTH(content) AS content_len, REGEXP_REPLACE(title, '\s+', ' ') AS clean_title, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category_id ORDER BY created_at DESC) AS rn FROM articles WHERE REGEXP_LIKE(title, #{keyword}, 'i') OR DBMS_LOB.INSTR(content, #{keyword}) > 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
